violations.text: The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The ceiling paint in the ware-washing area was observed to be peeling 2) The ceiling paint in the dry storage room was observed to be peeling 3) The grout was observed lifting/missing around the food prep tables New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
The hot water handle of the hand-sink in the ware-washing area was observed to be leaking Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The drain to the 3-bay sink was observed with a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dry storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The blade of the slicer was observed to be gouged 2) The hot water handle of the hand-sink in the ware-washing area was observed to be leaking 3) Pre-flush sprayer faucet observed to be leaking New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The drain of the food prep sink was observed with a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
